name: a declared stack namespace that has a probe group activates its probes
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/full-surface-intake.sh" --workload "a credentialing platform" --stack-add react --classify 2>/dev/null | ruby -rjson -e 'c=JSON.parse(STDIN.read)["workload_classification"]; exit(c["activated_probe_namespaces"].include?("react") ? 0:1)' && echo stack-activates-probes 1>&2
